q_gate.pass_b_skip_reason: fewer than 5 findings and no CRITICAL/HIGH severity

findings.rationale: Loop bound drops final token; downstream consumer expects all N tokens.
findings.remediation:
-    for i in range(len(tokens) - 1):
+    for i in range(len(tokens)):

intentional.justification: no test or comment justifies the -1

fix_breaks_dependents.justification: grep shows no caller relies on N-1 emission

findings.presenting_symptom: Token loop terminates one element early; final token silently dropped from output stream.
findings.underlying_cause: Off-by-one error in loop bound — range(len(tokens) - 1) instead of range(len(tokens)).
findings.prognosis: Downstream consumers expecting N tokens silently receive N-1 tokens, causing incomplete results with no error signal.
